scripts.build: slidev build kinto-pitch.md --base /kinto-pitch/ --out dist/kinto-pitch && slidev build random-pitch.md --base /random-pitch/ --out dist/random-pitch && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('landing.html', 'dist/index.html'); require('fs').copyFileSync('public/kinto-pitch.pdf', 'dist/kinto-pitch/kinto-pitch.pdf'); require('fs').copyFileSync('public/random-pitch.pdf', 'dist/random-pitch/random-pitch.pdf');"
